response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the video as a live performance of Kizuna AI from the concert "hello, world". 2. Used the song title and artist information found in the video and web search. The song is 'AIAIAI' by Yasutaka Nakata, performed by Kizuna AI. 3. Located the full lyrics in Japanese and their English translation from official sources. 4. Created the JSON object with the detected information.
response.global_summary: A live performance of 'AIAIAI' by Kizuna AI from her 1st Live "hello, world" concert. The video captures the entire song performance with the crowd and light sticks.

scenes.description: The song 'AIAIAI' is performed by Kizuna AI. The audience is shown with light sticks throughout the performance.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hold me tight, hold me tight, form our own reality
Make my tears and my fears fly away
And it seems like a dream when you're right in front of me
Just like this, you and me, every day
Ready? Go!

You hear that clap? That alluring melody?
Why is that? Why is that? Why won't somebody tell me?
Tap-tap-tap-tapping on the kitchen floor with glee
Throw it out, throw it out. Here, I've got a treat for you
I can do a little teeny tiny bit more
Peeking, poking, pouncing, bouncing. Jumping galore
Gushing, flushing, blushing, this is love, I can tell
I know, I know, I know

Hold me tight, hold me tight, form our own reality
Make my tears and my fears fly away
And it seems like a dream when you're right in front of me
Just like this, you and AI, every day
Here we go!

A-AI, AI, AI. H-hold me, hold me, hold me
A-AI, AI, AI. P-pull me, pull me, pull me
A-AI, AI, AI. H-hold me, hold me, hold me
A-AI, AI, AI. A-AI, AI, AIAIAI

Pull me close, pull me close, you're the only one for me
Here it comes, here it comes, deep inside
More and more, more and more, don't you let it get away
Now my whole future life is by your side
Now clap your hands!

Hold me tight, hold me tight, form our own reality
Make my tears and my fears fly away
And it seems like a dream when you're right in front of me
Just like this, you and AI, every day
Here we go!
